overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a traditional East Asian courtyard estate with a burning building and large missile launcher installation. The player moves from a covered wooden corridor through a fire-damaged area to an open courtyard featuring a prominent tilting missile structure and pagoda.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden corridor of traditional estate

events.description: exits covered wooden corridor into open courtyard area

agents.ego_description: walking through covered wooden corridor with pistol drawn, turning right toward the exit

entered.detail: dark wooden beam ceiling of the covered walkway
stone wall covered in green ivy vines
traditional paper sliding door with wooden frame

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a covered wooden corridor with dark beams overhead and ivy-covered stone walls. Traditional paper screen doors line the left side as the player walks forward and turns right toward the courtyard exit.

events.description: discovers burning traditional building with thick smoke rising from roof
approaches and examines rubble pile with red gas cylinders

agents.ego_description: approaching burning building and investigating debris and rubble on the ground

entered.detail: two-story wooden building with green roof tiles engulfed in flames and smoke
thick gray smoke rising from the burning roof
scattered concrete chunks and broken materials on ground
red cylindrical gas tanks lying among the rubble
charred stone and wood wall with broken windows

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered corridor, the player discovers a traditional building engulfed in flames with thick smoke billowing from the roof. The player approaches the rubble-strewn area, examining red gas cylinders and debris scattered across the stone paving.

events.description: enters main courtyard revealing large missile launcher structure

agents.ego_description: walking across courtyard toward large missile launcher installation

entered.detail: large vertical missile on ornate stone launch platform
multi-tiered traditional pagoda with green roof tiles
patches of green grass between stone paving

segments.scene_description: The player enters a wide open courtyard dominated by a massive missile launcher mounted on an ornate stone platform. Traditional wooden buildings with green tiled roofs surround the area, and a multi-tiered pagoda rises in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: courtyard center with tilting missile and pagoda backdrop

events.description: begins circling around the missile launcher structure
camera looks up toward bright sun creating lens flare

agents.ego_description: circling the missile launcher and looking up at the structure against the pagoda and bright sky

segments.scene_description: The player circles the missile launcher, which tilts upward against the bright midday sun. The pagoda looms larger in the frame as the camera looks up, capturing the contrast between the traditional architecture and the modern weapon installation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sheltered confines of a traditional estate into a wide, chaotic courtyard dominated by a massive weapon installation. It begins within a covered wooden corridor, passing under dark beams and ivy-covered stone walls before turning right toward the exit. As the camera emerges from the corridor, the scene shifts to a disaster zone where a traditional building is engulfed in flames and thick smoke, with the path littered by red gas cylinders and rubble. The view then opens into a vast courtyard featuring green-tiled roofs and a towering pagoda, centering on a massive missile launcher mounted on an ornate stone platform. Finally, the camera circles the installation as it tilts upward toward the bright midday sun, emphasizing the stark contrast between the ancient architecture and the modern machinery.
